description: Resource drain, maintenance, sacrifice, and upkeep. What the item demands from its wielder to keep functioning.
limitations: Gem Hunger
It eats precious stones like candy. After every encounter, it demands to be fed, and its appetite is expensive.
Vitality Tap
Each activation draws from the wielder's deepest reserves. The body pays what the mind commands.
Spell Drain
It siphons the wielder's strongest magic to fuel itself. The most potent incantation vanishes first.
Coin Bleed
Currency vanishes into thin air with each use. The gold does not fall, it simply ceases to exist.
Moonbathed
It must drink moonlight every night or its power fades by morning. Cloudy skies are its worst enemy.
Jewel Socket
A fresh gemstone must be set into its surface each dawn. The stone is consumed, and the item demands another.
Blood Tithe
A vial of the wielder's own blood each dawn. The item will not negotiate, and it can tell if you cheat.
Generous Toll
A portion of every treasure must go to the poor, or the item shuts down. Greed is the one thing it will not abide.
Rare Polish
Weekly care with costly oils and rare compounds. Neglect the maintenance and watch the magic tarnish and die.
Energy Siphon
It feeds on the wielder's stamina, leaving them breathless and shaking after each burst of power.
Material Cost
Something from the pack disappears each time. A potion, a ration, a keepsake. The item consumes without asking.
Stamina Thief
It steals energy from the wielder in sudden jolts. One moment full of vigor, the next gasping and weak.
Life Debt
It demands the ultimate price. A living sacrifice to fuel its deepest power. The item does not care whose.
Soul Scar
Something permanent is taken with each use. The marks do not show on the skin but they never heal.
Recharge Ritual
After each use, a specific ritual must be performed to restore its abilities. Skip it and carry a paperweight.
Costly Upkeep
Maintaining it drains the purse at an alarming rate. The item's appetite for expensive care never diminishes.
Memory Tax
A treasured memory dissolves with each use. The wielder forgets a face, a name, a moment that mattered.
Borrowed Luck
It pulls fortune from the wielder's future to power the present. Tomorrow's good luck fuels today's miracle.
